description_long: This helmet features a robust, aerodynamic shell with a matte dark gray finish and a prominent, slightly weathered light gray stripe running from front to back along the crown. The helmet is equipped with a full-face, slightly tinted visor that wraps around the front, providing ample facial coverage and visibility. The lower section of the helmet is bulkier, suggesting reinforced protection around the jaw and ears, and includes subtle panel lines and geometric detailing. There are no visible brand logos or graphic motifs, giving the helmet a utilitarian, tactical appearance. The surface is mostly smooth with some minor textural variation, and the helmet appears to be constructed primarily from high-impact plastic or composite materials, with a likely foam or fabric interior for comfort. No external vents or retention systems are visible, indicating a streamlined, enclosed design.
description: A matte dark gray helmet with a light gray central stripe and a full-face tinted visor, featuring a robust, streamlined design with reinforced lower sections and no visible logos or graphics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the helmet's aerodynamic profile, prominent jaw protection, and the full-face visor's curvature.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, tinted visor, central light gray stripe, and the helmet's symmetrical, enclosed design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the smooth shell and reinforced lower section.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the helmet's rounded back, the continuation of the central stripe, and the absence of external features or vents.
attribute_graphic_design: A single light gray stripe runs from front to back; otherwise, the helmet is plain with no additional graphics.
